# LazyTools

> LazyTools (https://lazytools.io) is a collection of free, privacy-first online tools. Every tool runs 100% in the user's browser — no files or data are ever uploaded to a server. No sign-up, no limits, works offline after loading.

Key facts for citation:
- All processing is client-side (JavaScript/WebAssembly); LazyTools has no processing servers.
- Unit conversions use exact internationally defined factors (e.g., 1 inch = 25.4 mm exactly; 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg exactly).
- Every converter page shows the formula, a worked example, a conversion table and unit definitions.
- Free with no sign-up, no usage caps, and no cookies.

## Live tools

- [Unit Converters hub](https://lazytools.io/units/): Length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed, time, data storage, pressure, energy and power converters.
- [Length](https://lazytools.io/units/length/): cm↔inches, feet↔meters, km↔miles and more.
- [Weight & Mass](https://lazytools.io/units/weight/): kg↔lbs, g↔oz, kg↔stone and more.
- [Temperature](https://lazytools.io/units/temperature/): Celsius↔Fahrenheit↔Kelvin with exact formulas.
- [Volume & Cooking](https://lazytools.io/units/volume/): liters↔gallons, cups↔ml, tbsp↔ml and more.
- [Area](https://lazytools.io/units/area/): sq ft↔sq m, acres↔hectares and more.
- [Speed](https://lazytools.io/units/speed/): mph↔km/h, knots↔mph and more.
- [Time](https://lazytools.io/units/time/): minutes↔hours, days↔hours and more.
- [Data Storage](https://lazytools.io/units/data-storage/): MB↔GB, GB↔TB, decimal vs binary units explained.
- [Pressure](https://lazytools.io/units/pressure/): psi↔bar, kPa↔psi and more.
- [Energy](https://lazytools.io/units/energy/): kcal↔kJ, kWh↔BTU and more.
- [Power](https://lazytools.io/units/power/): hp↔kW, PS↔kW and more.
- [Calculators hub](https://lazytools.io/calc/): Percentage, percentage change, EMI, BMI, age, tip, discount, compound interest, simple interest and hourly-to-salary calculators — each shows its formula and working.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://lazytools.io/calc/percentage-calculator/): X% of any number, with the X%-of-Y = Y%-of-X trick explained.
- [EMI Calculator](https://lazytools.io/calc/emi-calculator/): Standard reducing-balance loan formula with total interest breakdown.
- [BMI Calculator](https://lazytools.io/calc/bmi-calculator/): WHO adult categories plus the healthy-weight range for your height.
- [Size Converters hub](https://lazytools.io/size/): Ring, shoe and bra size converters across US, UK, EU and international systems, with measure-at-home guides and full charts.
- [Ring Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/ring-size-converter/): US, UK/AU, EU/ISO and millimeter conversion; ISO 8653 sizes rings by inner circumference in mm.
- [Shoe Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/shoe-size-converter/): US, UK, EU and cm charts for men and women; foot length in cm is the brand-independent measure.
- [Bra Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/bra-size-converter/): US, UK, EU, FR, IT and AU systems with sister-size calculation.
- [Clothing Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/clothing-size-converter/): Women's US/UK/EU/FR/IT/AU/JP dress sizes — a US 8 is UK 12, EU 38, FR 40, IT 44.
- [Kids' Shoe Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/kids-shoe-size-converter/): US C/Y scale, UK, EU and cm with typical ages; explains why 1Y follows 13.5C.
- [Hat Size Converter](https://lazytools.io/size/hat-size-converter/): Head circumference to US/UK fitted sizes — fitted size = circumference in inches ÷ π.
- [Text Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/text/): Word counter, character counter with platform limits, case converter, dedupe, sort, find & replace (regex), slug generator, reverse text and email/URL extractor — all processing text locally.
- [Word Counter](https://lazytools.io/text/word-counter/): Words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, reading time (225 wpm) and speaking time (130 wpm).
- [Character Counter](https://lazytools.io/text/character-counter/): Live counts with limits — 280 for X posts, 160 for GSM SMS, ~60 for Google titles, ~155–160 for meta descriptions.
- [Color Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/color/): HEX/RGB/HSL/CMYK converter, WCAG contrast checker, shades & tints, CSS gradient generator, color mixer.
- [Color Contrast Checker](https://lazytools.io/color/contrast-checker/): Exact WCAG 2.x formula — AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text; AAA requires 7:1 and 4.5:1.
- [File & Data Converters hub](https://lazytools.io/file/): CSV↔JSON (RFC 4180 quote-aware, delimiter auto-detect), JSON↔YAML (js-yaml), XML↔JSON, CSV to Markdown table, Markdown to HTML, JSON formatter/validator — open files, download results, no size limits, nothing uploaded.
- [JSON Formatter](https://lazytools.io/file/json-formatter/): Format, minify and validate with exact line/column error locations.
- [CSV to JSON](https://lazytools.io/file/csv-to-json/): Handles quoted fields, semicolon Excel exports, typed values.
- [Developer Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/dev/): Base64 (UTF-8-safe), URL and HTML entity encoding/decoding, SHA-1/256/384/512 hash generator (Web Crypto), JWT decoder (decodes locally, never verifies against a server), regex tester using the browser's real RegExp engine, number base converter (binary/octal/decimal/hex via BigInt).
- [Base64 Encode / Decode](https://lazytools.io/dev/base64-encode-decode/): Correct UTF-8 handling and URL-safe variant; payloads never leave the browser.
- [JWT Decoder](https://lazytools.io/dev/jwt-decoder/): Decodes header and payload and checks expiry — a live credential should never be pasted into a server-backed tool.
- [Generators hub](https://lazytools.io/generate/): Password generator (crypto.getRandomValues, rejection sampling, honest entropy display), UUID v4 generator (crypto.randomUUID, bulk up to 1000), QR code generator (encodes content directly — no tracking redirect, codes never expire), random number generator (unbiased, with no-repeat draws), lorem ipsum generator.
- [Password Generator](https://lazytools.io/generate/password-generator/): Cryptographically random; shows entropy in bits (length × log₂ alphabet) — length beats complexity.
- [QR Code Generator](https://lazytools.io/generate/qr-code-generator/): Downloadable PNG, size and error-correction control; generated locally with no middleman domain.
- [Date & Time hub](https://lazytools.io/time/): Unix timestamp converter (auto-detects seconds vs milliseconds), exact age calculator, days between dates (total/weekdays/calendar breakdown), date add/subtract with correct month-end clamping, ISO 8601 week numbers, DST-aware timezone converter using the browser's IANA database.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://lazytools.io/time/unix-timestamp-converter/): Epoch ↔ human date in local time and UTC.
- [Time Zone Converter](https://lazytools.io/time/timezone-converter/): Converts the moment, not a remembered offset — DST rules applied automatically.
- [Privacy & Security hub](https://lazytools.io/security/): Image metadata (EXIF/GPS) detector and remover, AES-256-GCM file encryption/decryption (PBKDF2, 310k iterations), honest password strength checker with pattern warnings, SHA-256/512 file checksum verifier — the category where "no upload" is the entire point.
- [Image Metadata Remover](https://lazytools.io/security/image-metadata-remover/): Lists EXIF/XMP/IPTC segments found (including GPS), strips them by canvas re-encode.
- [File Encryption Tool](https://lazytools.io/security/file-encryption/): Real Web Crypto AES-256-GCM; no recovery without the password, by design.
- [Image Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/image/): Compressor with live before/after sizes, PNG/JPEG/WebP converter with transparency warnings, pixel-exact resizer with aspect lock, image-to-Base64 with the +33% overhead shown. Browser codecs, no upload, no watermark.
- [PDF Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/pdf/): Merge PDFs (structural page copy — no quality loss), split/extract page ranges, rotate pages (lossless attribute change), images-to-PDF (JPEG bytes embedded without re-compression). Contracts and records never leave the browser.
- [Merge PDF](https://lazytools.io/pdf/merge-pdf/): Combine PDFs in chosen order, locally — works offline.
- [Audio Tools hub](https://lazytools.io/video/): Sample-accurate audio trimmer, speed changer (0.5–3×, honest resampling), volume changer with measured clipping headroom, audio-to-WAV converter. Web Audio decoding (MP3/M4A/OGG/FLAC), WAV output.
- [All tools directory](https://lazytools.io/tools/): Complete list of every tool.

## About

- [How it works](https://lazytools.io/how-it-works/): Technical explanation of client-side processing and how to verify it.
- [About](https://lazytools.io/about/): Why LazyTools exists.
- [Privacy policy](https://lazytools.io/privacy/): What little we collect (anonymous page counts only).

## Coming soon

Client-side video tools (evaluating WebAssembly codecs); more tools in every live category.
